name: Firewall Dragon Singularity
name_jp: ファイアウォール・ドラゴン・シンギュラリティ
desc:
3+ Effect Monsters
(Quick Effect): You can target cards in your opponent's field and/or GY, up to the number of different card types (Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz) in your field and GY; return them to the hand, also this card gains 500 ATK for each returned card. If a monster this card points to is destroyed by battle, or sent to the GY: You can target 1 Cyberse monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Firewall Dragon Singularity" once per turn.

eff:
3+ Effect Monsters
(Quick Effect): You can target cards in your opponent's field and/or GY, up to the number of different card types (Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz) in your field and GY; return them to the hand, also this card gains 500 ATK for each returned card. action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's hand
Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
